fixtures.description: Forwarded email containing a deadline the user needs to act on
fixtures.subject: Fwd: Summer camp registration closes Friday
fixtures.body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Camp Sunshine <noreply@campsunshine.org>
Date: Mon, Apr 21, 2026
Subject: Summer camp registration closes Friday
To: greg@example.com

Dear Parent,

Just a reminder that online registration for Summer 2026 closes this Friday, April 25th. Space is limited.

Register at: campsunshine.org/register

Fee: $350 due at registration.

---
Camp Sunshine · 123 Camp Rd, Lake Placid NY 12946
Unsubscribe | Privacy Policy

fixtures.description: Forwarded bill that needs to be paid
fixtures.subject: Fwd: Your bill is ready – City Water Dept
fixtures.body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: City Water <billing@citywater.gov>
Date: Tue, Apr 22, 2026
Subject: Your bill is ready
To: greg@example.com

Your water bill for April is $74.20 and is due by May 5, 2026.

Pay online at: citywater.gov/pay

---
City Water Department · 456 Municipal Blvd, Springfield
To unsubscribe from billing notices, visit your account settings.

fixtures.description: Forwarded school email with an action required
fixtures.subject: Fwd: Permission slip due Thursday – Field trip to museum
fixtures.body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jefferson Elementary <no-reply@jefferson.edu>
Date: Mon, Apr 20, 2026
Subject: Permission slip due Thursday
To: greg@example.com

Dear Families,

Please return the signed permission slip for the science museum field trip by Thursday, April 24th. You may also sign digitally at parent.jefferson.edu.

The trip is Friday April 25th. Students should bring a bag lunch.

---
Jefferson Elementary School · 789 School St, Springfield
Powered by SchoolMessenger

retired.retired_reason: Bare 'Done' with no other context is too ambiguous and unrealistic as a standalone email. Real completions either reference the task by name or are forwarded confirmations.
retired.description: Just 'Done' with exactly one open task
retired.subject: Done

retired.retired_reason: Bare 'Done' with no context is too unrealistic. Removed in favor of more concrete real-world fixtures.
retired.subject: Done

retired.retired_reason: 'Done with the thing' with no specifics is too contrived. Removed in favor of realistic completions that name the task.
retired.description: 'Done with the thing' where open tasks are completely unrelated
retired.subject: Done with the thing

retired.retired_reason: Contrived multi-intent case. Removed in favor of more realistic fixtures.
retired.description: Email completes an open task AND mentions a new to-do
retired.subject: I paid the bill and also remind me to call the accountant

retired.retired_reason: Router consistently returns add_task for this case — the link between 'appointment confirmed' and 'schedule dentist cleanings' is too indirect for reliable routing. Changed to add_task expectation and promoted to active fixtures as add-fwd-appointment-confirmed-no-task.
retired.description: Forwarded appointment confirmation matching an open scheduling task
retired.subject: Fwd: Appointment Confirmed – Dr. Smith

Your appointment has been confirmed.

Please arrive 10 minutes early.

---
Dr. Smith Dental · 555 Dental Way

retired.retired_reason: Original expected add_task but complete_task is more correct — when there's a clear matching open task, completing it is the right primary action.
retired.description: Email mentions completing one thing and adding another — should pick a route, not fail
retired.subject: I paid the bill and also remind me to call the accountant
